subcodes.title: Words spoken at Hotel Schenley in Pittsburgh, 1912-05-07
subcodes.first_line: The friends here are anxious to know if I like these rooms! They do not know what we had to go through in the past. Imagine the conditions
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @banishment to; life in 'Akka
